name: build-lynx-apps
description: Build Lynx.js app surfaces, pages, bundles, and diagnostics with official Lynx tooling, first-class Lynx AI skill guidance, Lynx-native UI guidance, visual concept workflows, and optional app-service integration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Build Lynx app surfaces with official tooling, Lynx AI skills, Lynx-native UI, and visual QA guidance
interface.longDescription: Use Build Lynx Apps to create and improve Lynx.js app surfaces, pages, projects, and bundles from image-generated concepts, route framework questions through official Lynx Docs and DevTool MCPs, apply first-class companions for the official Lynx AI skill set (ReactLynx best practices, TypeScript, DevTool, trace recording, trace analysis, and debug-info remapping), cover broader Lynx ecosystem guidance such as Habitat, reactlynx-use, and state-management examples, compose UI with read-only @dumbooks/lynx-ui guidance, and optionally plan Stripe or Supabase/Postgres app-service integrations without UI-framework assumptions. Complete native, mobile, desktop, or web host applications require the host integration path documented by official Lynx resources.
defaultPrompt: Build a polished Lynx.js app surface with official-doc routing, first-class Lynx skill guardrails, and a verified visual/runtime workflow.
